samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="PIPELINE_STAGES" value="3">Number of pipeline stages in the adder.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="i_en_reg" description="Register to store the input enable signal.">i_en_reg</reg>
            <reg id="adda_reg" width_description="[63:0]" description="Register to store input operand A.">adda_reg</reg>
            <reg id="addb_reg" width_description="[63:0]" description="Register to store input operand B.">addb_reg</reg>
            <reg id="o_en_reg" description="Register to store the output enable signal.">o_en_reg</reg>
            <reg id="sum_reg" width_description="[64:0]" description="Register to store the sum result.">sum_reg</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <always_comb>
            <comb id="sum_reg[0]" description="Calculate the sum of adda_reg[0] and addb_reg[0].">sum_reg[0] = adda_reg[0] + addb_reg[0];</comb>
            <comb id="o_en_reg" description="Calculate the output enable signal.">o_en_reg = i_en_reg & ~rst_n;</comb>
        </always_comb>
        <always_ff>
            <if description="Reset condition">
                <true description="Reset the registers on the active low reset signal">
                    <assign id="i_en_reg" value="0" description="Reset i_en_reg to 0 on reset."/>
                    <assign id="adda_reg" value="0" description="Reset adda_reg to 0 on reset."/>
                    <assign id="addb_reg" value="0" description="Reset addb_reg to 0 on reset."/>
                    <assign id="o_en_reg" value="0" description="Reset o_en_reg to 0 on reset."/>
                    <assign id="sum_reg" value="0" description="Reset sum_reg to 0 on reset."/>
                </true>
                <false description="Update the registers on the rising edge of the clock">
                    <assign id="i_en_reg" value="i_en" description="Update i_en_reg with the input enable signal."/>
                    <assign id="adda_reg" value="adda" description="Update adda_reg with input operand A."/>
                    <assign id="addb_reg" value="addb" description="Update addb_reg with input operand B."/>
                    <assign id="sum_reg[1]" value="adda_reg[1] + addb_reg[1] + sum_reg[0]" description="Calculate the sum of adda_reg[1] and addb_reg[1], including the carry from the previous stage."/>
                    <assign id="sum_reg[2:1]" value="sum_reg[1:0]" description="Propagate the sum result to the next stage."/>
                    <assign id="o_en_reg" value="i_en_reg & ~rst_n" description="Update the output enable signal."/>
                </false>
            </if>
        </always_ff>
        <assign id="result" value="sum_reg" description="Assign the sum_reg to the result output."/>
        <assign id="o_en" value="o_en_reg" description="Assign the o_en_reg to the output enable signal."/>
    </implementation>
</module>
